titles.title: LinearMPC.jl: A Julia Package for Embedded Linear Model Predictive Control

citation.article_title: A dual active-set solver for embedded quadratic programming using recursive LDL^{T} updates
citation.author: Arnström
citation.unstructured_citation: Arnström, D., Bemporad, A., & Axehill, D. (2022). A dual active-set solver for embedded quadratic programming using recursive LDL^{T} updates. IEEE Transactions on Automatic Control, 67(8), 4362–4369. https://doi.org/10.1109/TAC.2022.3176430

citation.article_title: A high-performant multi-parametric quadratic programming solver
citation.author: Arnström
citation.journal_title: 2024 IEEE 63rd conference on decision and control (CDC)

citation.article_title: The explicit linear quadratic regulator for constrained systems
citation.author: Bemporad
citation.unstructured_citation: Bemporad, A., Morari, M., Dua, V., & Pistikopoulos, E. N. (2002). The explicit linear quadratic regulator for constrained systems. Automatica, 38(1), 3–20. https://doi.org/10.1016/S0005-1098(01)00174-1

citation.article_title: Evaluation of piecewise affine control via binary search tree
citation.author: Tøndel
citation.unstructured_citation: Tøndel, P., Johansen, T. A., & Bemporad, A. (2003). Evaluation of piecewise affine control via binary search tree. Automatica, 39(5), 945–950. https://doi.org/10.1016/S0005-1098(02)00308-4

citation.article_title: acados—a modular open-source framework for fast embedded optimal control
citation.author: Verschueren
citation.unstructured_citation: Verschueren, R., Frison, G., Kouzoupis, D., Frey, J., Duijkeren, N. van, Zanelli, A., Novoselnik, B., Albin, T., Quirynen, R., & Diehl, M. (2022). acados—a modular open-source framework for fast embedded optimal control. Mathematical Programming Computation, 14(1), 147–183. https://doi.org/10.1007/s12532-021-00208-8

citation.article_title: ModelPredictiveControl.jl: Advanced process control made easy in Julia

citation.author: Arnström
